name: Velocity Frequent Flyer
one_liner: Virgin Australia's free loyalty program — earn points and status on domestic flights.
benefit: Free to join; earn Velocity points on Virgin Australia and partner airline flights, Flybuys transfers, Shell Coles Express, Uber, and credit card partners; redeem for Virgin flights, upgrades, and partner rewards.

how_to_join.action: Join for free at virginaustralia.com/velocity — no joining fee
Link your Flybuys card to convert Flybuys points to Velocity at a 2:1 ratio
Add your Velocity number to Virgin Australia bookings and Uber to earn on every trip

prerequisites: Any age (under 18 via a family account)
risks: Points expire after 24 months of inactivity
Flybuys-to-Velocity transfer rate (2:1) is relatively poor value; earning direct is better
Velocity points are mainly useful for domestic AU and select international Virgin/partner flights
est_value: Free to join — worth holding to earn on any Virgin Australia flights you take
